pawn.data: 埃尔佩利希丨吸血天使*Milira_Mechanitor_ForScenario*米莉拉地面考察站|Milira_PlayerFaction*塔苏拉?埃尔佩利希丨吸血天使?埃尔佩利希*75728009*-436095836*1*Female**0**14:5:0:0:11:0:0:0:2:0:0:9:0:0:13:0:0:14:0:0:4:0:0:0:0:0:14:0:0:0:12:0:0:1:0:0:6:0:0:14:0:0:0:12:0:0:2:0:0*Milira_Null**FF-00-00-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF*-1*FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-EF-63-FF*D9-E0-E2-FF*Shooting|0|0|0|0:Melee|18|2|23098|-460:Construction|10|2|2989.125|11.25:Mining|0|0|0|0:Cooking|0|0|0|0:Plants|0|0|0|0:Animals|0|0|0|0:Crafting|10|2|-64.19959|-11.50001:Artistic|3|0|-128.3992|-23.00002:Medicine|0|0|0|0:Social|2|0|4.2|0:Intellectual|11|2|1971.63|-23.00002*Tough|0:Nimble|0:Brawler|0:QuickSleeper|0:NaturalMood|2:Industriousness|1:Industriousness|2:PsychicSensitivity|2:Nerves|2:SpeedOffset|2:Beauty|1:Bloodlust|0:Transhumanist|0:AT_Solidexoskeleton|0*OAGene_EfficientNeuron|0.5|||0|-1|-1|-1|:GeneticDrugNeed|0.428002|||0|-1|-1|-1|:MechlinkImplant|0.5|Brain|15|0|-1|-1|-1|:PsychicBond|0.5|||0|-1|-1|-1|萨拉?萨拉丨纯血精灵?埃莉欧娜*FireKeeper44*Milira_BackstoryAdult_07*Firefighter|3:Patient|3:Doctor|0:PatientBedRest|3:BasicWorker|3:Warden|0:Handling|0:Cooking|0:Hunting|0:Construction|1:Growing|3:Mining|3:PlantCutting|0:Smithing|3:Tailoring|3:Art|0:Crafting|3:Hauling|3:Cleaning|3:Research|3:Childcare|3:DarkStudy|3:Fishing|3:RK_HamsterWheel|3:Anty_breeding|0*Milira_Glaive||FF-FF-FF-FF|2|1|180*Milian_BishopCloak|RK_Wool_KingHamster|EB-C5-AA-FF|0|1|150**Kills|0:KillsHumanlikes|0:KillsAnimals|0:KillsMechanoids|0:PawnsDowned|0:PawnsDownedHumanlikes|0:PawnsDownedAnimals|0:PawnsDownedMechanoids|0:ShotsFired|0:Headshots|0:DamageDealt|0:DamageTaken|0:TimesInMentalState|0:TimesOnFire|0:FiresExtinguished|0:OperationsReceived|0:OperationsPerformed|0:TimesTendedTo|0:TimesTendedOther|0:PeopleCaptured|0:PrisonersRecruited|0:PrisonersChatted|0:AnimalsTamed|0:AnimalsSlaughtered|0:MealsCooked|0:ThingsConstructed|131:ThingsInstalled|0:ThingsRepaired|0:ThingsCrafted|0:ThingsHauled|24:PlantsSown|0:PlantsHarvested|0:CellsMined|0:MessesCleaned|0:ResearchPointsResearched|0:CorpsesBuried|0:Nutritio lira_MouthNormal|Milira_SkinNormal**MiliraHead1*Baseliner*阿喀琉斯丨吸血天使*AntyGeneticFlexibility:Wolfein_MeatLover:Wolfein_ToxicEnvironmentResistance_Weak:Wolfein_JungleLaw:Milira_Mechining:Hemogenic:OAGene_SpecificHemogen:HemogenDrain:Coagulate:Deathrest:Immunity_Strong:WoundHealing_SuperFast:Superclotting:OAGene_ExcellentPhysique:PsychicAbility_Enhanced:PsychicBonding:Turn_Gene_VeryFastNeuralHeat:MoveSpeed_VeryQuick:OAGene_AgilityAction:Mood_Sanguine:MinTemp_SmallDecrease:MaxTemp_SmallIncrease:FireResistant:MeleeDamage_Strong:Turn_Gene_Duelist:OAGene_DenseMuscles:Robust:OAGene_HardBone:OAGene_HardBoneShell:Beauty_Ugly:OAGene_EfficientNeuron:Turn_Gene_FrailDigestion:Nearsighted:ElongatedFingers:OAGene_MonarchyBased:OAGene_BloodCellsAutophagy:Unstoppable:OAGene_AbnormalBodyStructure:OAGene_OAMetabolicGeneChain:Turn_Gene_MotivationHigh:AptitudeTerrible_Shooting:AptitudePoor_Mining:AptitudeTerrible_Cooking:AptitudeTerrible_Plants:AptitudeTerrible_Animals:AptitudeTerrible_Artistic:AptitudeTerrible_Medicine:ChemicalDependency_Psychite***D9-E0-E2-FF***DarkTeal

pawn.name: 骑士II型 1
pawn.data: 骑士II型 1*Milian_Mechanoid_KnightII*米莉拉地面考察站|Milira_PlayerFaction*骑士II型
